v.CNV: 我的心哪！你要称颂耶和华；在我里面的一切，都要称颂他的圣名。（本节在《马索拉抄本》包括细字标题）
v.ESV: Bless the Lord , O my soul, and all that is within me, bless his holy name!
v.GAE: 내 영혼아 여호와를 송축하라 내 속에 있는 것들아 다 그의 거룩한 이름을 송축하라
v.KJV: Bless the LORD, O my soul: and all that is within me, bless his holy name.
v.NASB: Bless the LORD, O my soul, And all that is within me, bless His holy name.
v.NIV: Praise the Lord , my soul; all my inmost being, praise his holy name.
v.NRSV: Bless the LORD, O my soul, and all that is within me, bless his holy name.
v.SAENEW: 내 영혼아, 주님을 찬송하여라. 마음을 다하여 그 거룩하신 이름을 찬송하여라.
v.WLB: 오 내 영혼아, 여호와를 찬양하라. 내 속에 있는 모든 것들아, 그 거룩하신 이름을 찬양하라.

v.CNV: 我的心哪！你要称颂耶和华；不可忘记他的一切恩惠。
v.ESV: Bless the Lord , O my soul, and forget not all his benefits,
v.GAE: 내 영혼아 여호와를 송축하며 그의 모든 은택을 잊지 말지어다
v.KJV: Bless the LORD, O my soul, and forget not all his benefits:
v.NASB: Bless the LORD, O my soul, And forget none of His benefits;
v.NIV: Praise the Lord , my soul, and forget not all his benefits—
v.NRSV: Bless the LORD, O my soul, and do not forget all his benefits —
v.SAENEW: 내 영혼아, 주님을 찬송하여라. 주님이 베푸신 모든 은혜를 잊지 말아라.
v.WLB: 내 영혼아, 여호와를 찬양하고 그분께서 베풀어 주신 모든 은혜를 잊지 마라.

v.CNV: 他赦免你的一切罪孽，医治你的一切疾病；
v.ESV: who forgives all your iniquity, who heals all your diseases,
v.GAE: 그가 네 모든 죄악을 사하시며 네 모든 병을 고치시며
v.KJV: Who forgiveth all thine iniquities; who healeth all thy diseases;
v.NASB: Who pardons all your iniquities, Who heals all your diseases;
v.NIV: who forgives all your sins and heals all your diseases,
v.NRSV: who forgives all your iniquity, who heals all your diseases,
v.SAENEW: 주님은 너의 모든 죄를 용서해 주시는 분, 모든 병을 고쳐 주시는 분,
v.WLB: 그분은 네 모든 범죄를 용서하시고 네 모든 질병을 고치시며

v.CNV: 他救赎你的性命脱离死亡，以慈爱和怜悯作你的冠冕；
v.ESV: who redeems your life from the pit, who crowns you with steadfast love and mercy,
v.GAE: 네 생명을 파멸에서 속량하시고 인자와 긍휼로 관을 씌우시며
v.KJV: Who redeemeth thy life from destruction; who crowneth thee with lovingkindness and tender mercies;
v.NASB: Who redeems your life from the pit, Who crowns you with lovingkindness and compassion;
v.NIV: who redeems your life from the pit and crowns you with love and compassion,
v.NRSV: who redeems your life from the Pit, who crowns you with steadfast love and mercy,
v.SAENEW: 생명을 파멸에서 속량해 주시는 분, 사랑과 자비로 단장하여 주시는 분,
v.WLB: 네 생명을 멸망에서 구속하시고 사랑과 자비로 네게 관 씌우시며

v.CNV: 他以福乐使你的心愿满足，以致你好像鹰一般恢复青春的活力。
v.ESV: who satisfies you with good so that your youth is renewed like the eagle's.
v.GAE: 좋은 것으로 네 소원을 만족하게 하사 네 청춘을 독수리 같이 새롭게 하시는도다
v.KJV: Who satisfieth thy mouth with good things; so that thy youth is renewed like the eagle’s.
v.NASB: Who satisfies your years with good things, So that your youth is renewed like the eagle.
v.NIV: who satisfies your desires with good things so that your youth is renewed like the eagle’s.
v.NRSV: who satisfies you with good as long as you live so that your youth is renewed like the eagle’s.
v.SAENEW: 평생을 좋은 것으로 흡족히 채워 주시는 분, 네 젊음을 독수리처럼 늘 새롭게 해 주시는 분이시다.
v.WLB: 좋은 것으로 네 입을 채워 네 청춘을 독수리같이 새롭게 하신다.

v.CNV: 耶和华施行公义，为所有受欺压的人主持公道。
v.ESV: The Lord works righteousness and justice for all who are oppressed.
v.GAE: 여호와께서 공의로운 일을 행하시며 억압 당하는 모든 자를 위하여 심판하시는도다
v.KJV: The LORD executeth righteousness and judgment for all that are oppressed.
v.NASB: The LORD performs righteous deeds And judgments for all who are oppressed.
v.NIV: The Lord works righteousness and justice for all the oppressed.
v.NRSV: The LORD works vindication and justice for all who are oppressed.
v.SAENEW: 주님은 공의를 세우시며 억눌린 모든 사람의 권리를 변호하신다.
v.WLB: 여호와께서는 억압당하는 모든 사람들을 위해 의와 심판을 행하신다.

v.CNV: 他向摩西指示自己的道路，向以色列人显明自己的作为。
v.ESV: He made known his ways to Moses, his acts to the people of Israel.
v.GAE: 그의 행위를 모세에게, 그의 행사를 이스라엘 자손에게 알리셨도다
v.KJV: He made known his ways unto Moses, his acts unto the children of Israel.
v.NASB: He made known His ways to Moses, His acts to the sons of Israel.
v.NIV: He made known his ways to Moses, his deeds to the people of Israel:
v.NRSV: He made known his ways to Moses, his acts to the people of Israel.
v.SAENEW: 모세에게 주님의 뜻을 알려 주셨고, 이스라엘 자손에게 주님의 행적들을 알려 주셨다.
v.WLB: 하나님께서는 모세에게 그가 갈 길을 알려 주셨고 이스라엘 백성들에게 그분이 행하신 일들을 보여 주셨다.

v.CNV: 耶和华有怜悯，有恩典，不轻易发怒，并且有丰盛的慈爱。
v.ESV: The Lord is merciful and gracious, slow to anger and abounding in steadfast love.
v.GAE: 여호와는 긍휼이 많으시고 은혜로우시며 노하기를 더디 하시고 인자하심이 풍부하시도다
v.KJV: The LORD is merciful and gracious, slow to anger, and plenteous in mercy.
v.NASB: The LORD is compassionate and gracious, Slow to anger and abounding in lovingkindness.
v.NIV: The Lord is compassionate and gracious, slow to anger, abounding in love.
v.NRSV: The LORD is merciful and gracious, slow to anger and abounding in steadfast love.
v.SAENEW: 주님은 자비롭고, 은혜로우시며, 노하기를 더디하시며, 사랑이 그지없으시다.
v.WLB: 여호와께서는 자비로우시고 은혜로우시며 화를 더디 내시고 사랑이 넘쳐나는 분이시다.

v.CNV: 他不长久责备，也不永远怀怒。
v.ESV: He will not always chide, nor will he keep his anger forever.
v.GAE: 자주 경책하지 아니하시며 노를 영원히 품지 아니하시리로다
v.KJV: He will not always chide: neither will he keep his anger for ever.
v.NASB: He will not always strive with us, Nor will He keep His anger forever.
v.NIV: He will not always accuse, nor will he harbor his anger forever;
v.NRSV: He will not always accuse, nor will he keep his anger forever.
v.SAENEW: 두고두고 꾸짖지 않으시며, 노를 끝없이 품지 않으신다.
v.WLB: 항상 꾸짖지는 않으시고 끝까지 진노를 품지도 않으시리라.

v.CNV: 他没有按着我们的罪过待我们，也没有照着我们的罪孽报应我们。
v.ESV: He does not deal with us according to our sins, nor repay us according to our iniquities.
v.GAE: 우리의 죄를 따라 우리를 처벌하지는 아니하시며 우리의 죄악을 따라 우리에게 그대로 갚지는 아니하셨으니
v.KJV: He hath not dealt with us after our sins; nor rewarded us according to our iniquities.
v.NASB: He has not dealt with us according to our sins, Nor rewarded us according to our iniquities.
v.NIV: he does not treat us as our sins deserve or repay us according to our iniquities.
v.NRSV: He does not deal with us according to our sins, nor repay us according to our iniquities.
v.SAENEW: 우리 죄를, 지은 그대로 갚지 않으시고 우리 잘못을, 저지른 그대로 갚지 않으신다.
v.WLB: 하나님께서는 우리를 죄인으로 대하지 않으셨고 우리 죄악에 따라 갚지 않으셨다.

v.CNV: 天离地有多高，他的慈爱向敬畏他的人也有多大。
v.ESV: For as high as the heavens are above the earth, so great is his steadfast love toward those who fear him;
v.GAE: 이는 하늘이 땅에서 높음 같이 그를 경외하는 자에게 그의 인자하심이 크심이로다
v.KJV: For as the heaven is high above the earth, so great is his mercy toward them that fear him.
v.NASB: For as high as the heavens are above the earth, So great is His lovingkindness toward those who fear Him.
v.NIV: For as high as the heavens are above the earth, so great is his love for those who fear him;
v.NRSV: For as the heavens are high above the earth, so great is his steadfast love toward those who fear him;
v.SAENEW: 하늘이 땅에서 높음같이, 주님을 두려워하는 사람에게는, 그 사랑도 크시다.
v.WLB: 하늘이 땅 위에 높이 있는 것처럼 하나님을 경외하는 사람들에 대한 그분의 사랑도 크다.

v.CNV: 东离西有多远，他使我们的过犯离我们也有多远。
v.ESV: as far as the east is from the west, so far does he remove our transgressions from us.
v.GAE: 동이 서에서 먼 것 같이 우리의 죄과를 우리에게서 멀리 옮기셨으며
v.KJV: As far as the east is from the west, so far hath he removed our transgressions from us.
v.NASB: As far as the east is from the west, So far has He removed our transgressions from us.
v.NIV: as far as the east is from the west, so far has he removed our transgressions from us.
v.NRSV: as far as the east is from the west, so far he removes our transgressions from us.
v.SAENEW: 동이 서에서부터 먼 것처럼, 우리의 반역을 우리에게서 멀리 치우시며,
v.WLB: 동쪽이 서쪽에서 먼 것처럼 하나님께서는 우리 죄악을 우리에게서 멀리 옮기셨다.

v.CNV: 父亲怎样怜恤儿子，耶和华也照样怜恤敬畏他的人；
v.ESV: As a father shows compassion to his children, so the Lord shows compassion to those who fear him.
v.GAE: 아버지가 자식을 긍휼히 여김 같이 여호와께서는 자기를 경외하는 자를 긍휼히 여기시나니
v.KJV: Like as a father pitieth his children, so the LORD pitieth them that fear him.
v.NASB: Just as a father has compassion on his children, So the LORD has compassion on those who fear Him.
v.NIV: As a father has compassion on his children, so the Lord has compassion on those who fear him;
v.NRSV: As a father has compassion for his children, so the LORD has compassion for those who fear him.
v.SAENEW: 부모가 자식을 가엾게 여기듯이, 주님께서는 주님을 두려워하는 사람을 가엾게 여기신다.
v.WLB: 아버지가 자식을 불쌍히 여기듯 여호와께서도 주를 경외하는 사람들을 불쌍히 여기신다.

v.CNV: 因为他知道我们的本体，记得我们不过是尘土。
v.ESV: For he knows our frame; he remembers that we are dust.
v.GAE: 이는 그가 우리의 체질을 아시며 우리가 단지 먼지뿐임을 기억하심이로다
v.KJV: For he knoweth our frame; he remembereth that we are dust.
v.NASB: For He Himself knows our frame; He is mindful that we are but dust.
v.NIV: for he knows how we are formed, he remembers that we are dust.
v.NRSV: For he knows how we were made; he remembers that we are dust.
v.SAENEW: 주님께서는 우리가 어떻게 창조되었음을 알고 계시기 때문이며, 우리가 한갓 티끌임을 알고 계시기 때문이다.
v.WLB: 우리의 체질을 아시고 우리가 흙임을 기억하시기 때문이다.

v.CNV: 至于世人，他的年日好像草一般；他又像野地繁茂的花。
v.ESV: As for man, his days are like grass; he flourishes like a flower of the field;
v.GAE: 인생은 그 날이 풀과 같으며 그 영화가 들의 꽃과 같도다
v.KJV: As for man, his days are as grass: as a flower of the field, so he flourisheth.
v.NASB: As for man, his days are like grass; As a flower of the field, so he flourishes.
v.NIV: The life of mortals is like grass, they flourish like a flower of the field;
v.NRSV: As for mortals, their days are like grass; they flourish like a flower of the field;
v.SAENEW: 인생은, 그 날이 풀과 같고, 피고 지는 들꽃 같아,
v.WLB: 인생으로 말하자면 우리의 나날은 풀과 같고 들꽃처럼 번성하지만

v.CNV: 经风一吹，就归无有；他原来的地方再不认识他。
v.ESV: for the wind passes over it, and it is gone, and its place knows it no more.
v.GAE: 그것은 바람이 지나가면 없어지나니 그 있던 자리도 다시 알지 못하거니와
v.KJV: For the wind passeth over it, and it is gone; and the place thereof shall know it no more.
v.NASB: When the wind has passed over it, it is no more, And its place acknowledges it no longer.
v.NIV: the wind blows over it and it is gone, and its place remembers it no more.
v.NRSV: for the wind passes over it, and it is gone, and its place knows it no more.
v.SAENEW: 바람 한 번 지나가면 곧 시들어, 그 있던 자리마저 알 수 없는 것이다.
v.WLB: 바람이 불면 어디론가 사라지고 그 자리는 언제 그랬냐는 듯 흔적조차 없다.

v.CNV: 但从亘古到永远，耶和华的慈爱临到敬畏他的人；他的公义也归于他们的子子孙孙，
v.ESV: But the steadfast love of the Lord is from everlasting to everlasting on those who fear him, and his righteousness to children's children,
v.GAE: 여호와의 인자하심은 자기를 경외하는 자에게 영원부터 영원까지 이르며 그의 의는 자손의 자손에게 이르리니
v.KJV: But the mercy of the LORD is from everlasting to everlasting upon them that fear him, and his righteousness unto children’s children;
v.NASB: But the lovingkindness of the LORD is from everlasting to everlasting on those who fear Him, And His righteousness to children's children,
v.NIV: But from everlasting to everlasting the Lord ’s love is with those who fear him, and his righteousness with their children’s children —
v.NRSV: But the steadfast love of the LORD is from everlasting to everlasting on those who fear him, and his righteousness to children’s children,
v.SAENEW: 그러나 주님을 경외하는 사람에게는 주님의 사랑이 영원에서 영원까지 이르고, 주님의 의로우심은 자손 대대에 이를 것이니,
v.WLB: 그러나 여호와의 사랑은 영원에서 영원까지 여호와를 경외하는 사람들 위에 있고 그 의는 자녀의 자녀들,

v.CNV: 就是那些谨守他的约，记住他的训词，并且遵行的人。
v.ESV: to those who keep his covenant and remember to do his commandments.
v.GAE: 곧 그의 언약을 지키고 그의 법도를 기억하여 행하는 자에게로다
v.KJV: To such as keep his covenant, and to those that remember his commandments to do them.
v.NASB: To those who keep His covenant And remember His precepts to do them.
v.NIV: with those who keep his covenant and remember to obey his precepts.
v.NRSV: to those who keep his covenant and remember to do his commandments.
v.SAENEW: 곧 주님의 언약을 지키고 주님의 법도를 기억하여 따르는 사람에게 이를 것이다.
v.WLB: 곧 그 언약을 지키고 계명을 기억하고 순종하는 사람들에게 이를 것이다.

v.CNV: 耶和华在天上立定宝座，他的王权统管万有。
v.ESV: The Lord has established his throne in the heavens, and his kingdom rules over all.
v.GAE: 여호와께서 그의 보좌를 하늘에 세우시고 그의 왕권으로 만유를 다스리시도다
v.KJV: The LORD hath prepared his throne in the heavens; and his kingdom ruleth over all.
v.NASB: The LORD has established His throne in the heavens, And His sovereignty rules over all.
v.NIV: The Lord has established his throne in heaven, and his kingdom rules over all.
v.NRSV: The LORD has established his throne in the heavens, and his kingdom rules over all.
v.SAENEW: 주님은 그 보좌를 하늘에 든든히 세우시고, 그의 나라는 만유를 통치하신다.
v.WLB: 여호와께서 하늘에 옥좌를 마련하셨으니 그분의 나라가 모든 것을 다스린다.

v.CNV: 你们作他天使的，就是那些大有能力，行他所吩咐，以及听从他命令的，都要称颂耶和华。
v.ESV: Bless the Lord , O you his angels, you mighty ones who do his word, obeying the voice of his word!
v.GAE: 능력이 있어 여호와의 말씀을 행하며 그의 말씀의 소리를 듣는 여호와의 천사들이여 여호와를 송축하라
v.KJV: Bless the LORD, ye his angels, that excel in strength, that do his commandments, hearkening unto the voice of his word.
v.NASB: Bless the LORD, you His angels, Mighty in strength, who perform His word, Obeying the voice of His word!
v.NIV: Praise the Lord , you his angels, you mighty ones who do his bidding, who obey his word.
v.NRSV: Bless the LORD, O you his angels, you mighty ones who do his bidding, obedient to his spoken word.
v.SAENEW: 주님의 모든 천사들아, 주님의 말씀을 듣고 따르는, 힘찬 용사들아, 주님을 찬양하여라.
v.WLB: 힘이 넘쳐 하나님의 명령대로 수행하고 그 말씀하시는 음성을 듣는 너희 천사들아, 여호와를 찬양하라.

v.CNV: 你们作他的众军，作他的仆役，遵行他旨意的，都要称颂耶和华。
v.ESV: Bless the Lord , all his hosts, his ministers, who do his will!
v.GAE: 그에게 수종들며 그의 뜻을 행하는 모든 천군이여 여호와를 송축하라
v.KJV: Bless ye the LORD, all ye his hosts; ye ministers of his, that do his pleasure.
v.NASB: Bless the LORD, all you His hosts, You who serve Him, doing His will.
v.NIV: Praise the Lord , all his heavenly hosts, you his servants who do his will.
v.NRSV: Bless the LORD, all his hosts, his ministers that do his will.
v.SAENEW: 주님의 모든 군대들아, 그의 뜻을 이루는 종들아, 주님을 찬양하여라.
v.WLB: 너희 하늘의 모든 군대들아, 그분이 기뻐하시는 일을 하는 그분의 종들아, 여호와를 찬양하라.

v.CNV: 你们一切被他所造的，在他统治的各处，都要称颂耶和华。我的心哪，你要称颂耶和华。
v.ESV: Bless the Lord , all his works, in all places of his dominion. Bless the Lord , O my soul!
v.GAE: 여호와의 지으심을 받고 그가 다스리시는 모든 곳에 있는 너희여 여호와를 송축하라 내 영혼아 여호와를 송축하라
v.KJV: Bless the LORD, all his works in all places of his dominion: bless the LORD, O my soul.
v.NASB: Bless the LORD, all you works of His, In all places of His dominion; Bless the LORD, O my soul!
v.NIV: Praise the Lord , all his works everywhere in his dominion. Praise the Lord , my soul.
v.NRSV: Bless the LORD, all his works, in all places of his dominion. Bless the LORD, O my soul.
v.SAENEW: 주님께 지음 받은 사람들아, 주님께서 통치하시는 모든 곳에서 주님을 찬송하여라. 내 영혼아, 주님을 찬송하여라.
v.WLB: 하나님의 지배권 아래 있는 하나님의 모든 피조물들아, 여호와를 찬양하라. 오 내 영혼아, 여호와를 찬양하라.
